{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Specialist",
  "description": "Marsand Bespoke Joinery specializes in creating high-quality, custom-made joinery solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of each client. With a commitment to craftsmanship and attention to detail, they offer a wide range of services, including bespoke cabinetry, furniture, and architectural joinery. Their team of skilled artisans combines traditional woodworking techniques with modern technology to deliver exceptional products that enhance both functionality and aesthetics in residential and commercial spaces.

Marsand prides itself on its personalized service, working closely with clients to understand their vision and bring it to life. Whether it&rsquo;s a stunning kitchen renovation, a unique piece of furniture, or intricate woodwork for a commercial project, they ensure that every piece reflects the client&#39;s style and requirements. Their dedication to sustainability and using responsibly sourced materials further sets them apart in the joinery industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Specialist
Job Location:&nbsp;Awoyaya, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a creative and results-driven Social Media Specialist to join our growing team.
	If you are passionate about digital marketing, content creation, and driving engagement across platforms, this role is for you.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement social media strategies to increase brand awareness and engagement
	Create, schedule, and manage content across platforms (Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, etc.)
	Monitor social media trends and adjust campaigns accordingly
	Manage paid advertising campaigns (Meta Ads, etc.)
	Analyse performance metrics and provide regular reports
	Engage with followers, respond to comments/messages, and build an online community


Requirements


	Proven experience in social media management or digital marketing
	Strong understanding of social media platforms and algorithms
	Excellent content creation and copywriting skills
	Experience with social media tools (e.g., Hootsuite, Buffer, Meta Business Suite)
	Ability to analyse data and optimise performance
	Creative mindset with attention to detail.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;Marsandinternationalco@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only Lagos applicants.&nbsp;",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-20",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-15",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Marsand Bespoke Joinery"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "197700"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 150000,
      "maxValue": 250000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Social Media Specialist Job at Marsand Bespoke Joinery




        
    

        
        Marsand Bespoke Joinery specializes in creating high-quality, custom-made joinery solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of each client. With a commitment to craftsmanship and attention to detail, they offer a wide range of services, including bespoke cabinetry, furniture, and architectural joinery. Their team of skilled artisans combines traditional woodworking techniques with modern technology to deliver exceptional products that enhance both functionality and aesthetics in residential and commercial spaces.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Marsand prides itself on its personalized service, working closely with clients to understand their vision and bring it to life. Whether it’s a stunning kitchen renovation, a unique piece of furniture, or intricate woodwork for a commercial project, they ensure that every piece reflects the client's style and requirements. Their dedication to sustainability and using responsibly sourced materials further sets them apart in the joinery industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Specialist
Job Location: Awoyaya, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a creative and results-driven Social Media Specialist to join our growing team.
	If you are passionate about digital marketing, content creation, and driving engagement across platforms, this role is for you.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement social media strategies to increase brand awareness and engagement
	Create, schedule, and manage content across platforms (Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, etc.)
	Monitor social media trends and adjust campaigns accordingly
	Manage paid advertising campaigns (Meta Ads, etc.)
	Analyse performance metrics and provide regular reports
	Engage with followers, respond to comments/messages, and build an online community


Requirements


	Proven experience in social media management or digital marketing
	Strong understanding of social media platforms and algorithms
	Excellent content creation and copywriting skills
	Experience with social media tools (e.g., Hootsuite, Buffer, Meta Business Suite)
	Ability to analyse data and optimise performance
	Creative mindset with attention to detail.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only Lagos applicants.     

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Desk Officer",
  "description": "Greenland Hall is an excellent school, providing high-quality education both in the classroom and through a wide range of co-curricular activities. We have a history of high performance and put much of our success down to being an inclusive school at the heart of the community we serve.

We have high aspirations for all our students, and our goal is to improve the life chances of every learner, irrespective of their starting point. We believe that achievement leads to opportunity and choice, and this underpins all of our work in school.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos

The Role


	Are you the kind of person who can multitask with a smile? We are looking for a professional and welcoming Front Desk Officer to be the &quot;face&quot; of our company. As the first point of contact for clients, partners, and employees, you will play a crucial role in shaping the first impression of our organization.
	The ideal candidate is organized, tech-savvy, and possesses the &quot;people skills&quot; to handle everything from a high-stakes client arrival to a busy multi-line phone system.


Key Responsibilities


	Guest Relations: Greet and direct visitors, ensuring they feel welcome and are connected with the correct department promptly.
	Communication Hub: Manage the switchboard, screen incoming calls, and handle general email inquiries with speed and professionalism.
	Logistics &amp; Mail: Coordinate incoming and outgoing couriers, distribute mail, and maintain the visitor log.
	Administrative Support: Assist with basic bookkeeping, meeting room scheduling, and maintaining a tidy, stocked reception area.
	Security: Monitor office access and maintain security awareness by following check-in procedures.


What We&rsquo;re Looking For


	Experience: Previous experience in a reception, administrative, or customer service role is preferred.
	Tech Proficiency: Comfortable using MS Office (Word, Excel, Outlook) and office equipment (printers, VOIP phone systems).
	Communication: Exceptional verbal and written communication skills&mdash;you should be as clear in an email as you are in person.
	Professionalism: A polished appearance and the ability to remain calm and resourceful under pressure.
	Multitasking: The ability to juggle several tasks at once without letting the &quot;customer experience&quot; slide.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@greenlandhall.org&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Front Desk Officer Job at Greenland Hall




        
    

        
        Greenland Hall is an excellent school, providing high-quality education both in the classroom and through a wide range of co-curricular activities. We have a history of high performance and put much of our success down to being an inclusive school at the heart of the community we serve.

We have high aspirations for all our students, and our goal is to improve the life chances of every learner, irrespective of their starting point. We believe that achievement leads to opportunity and choice, and this underpins all of our work in school.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location: Lagos

The Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Are you the kind of person who can multitask with a smile? We are looking for a professional and welcoming Front Desk Officer to be the "face" of our company. As the first point of contact for clients, partners, and employees, you will play a crucial role in shaping the first impression of our organization.
	The ideal candidate is organized, tech-savvy, and possesses the "people skills" to handle everything from a high-stakes client arrival to a busy multi-line phone system.


Key Responsibilities


	Guest Relations: Greet and direct visitors, ensuring they feel welcome and are connected with the correct department promptly.
	Communication Hub: Manage the switchboard, screen incoming calls, and handle general email inquiries with speed and professionalism.
	Logistics & Mail: Coordinate incoming and outgoing couriers, distribute mail, and maintain the visitor log.
	Administrative Support: Assist with basic bookkeeping, meeting room scheduling, and maintaining a tidy, stocked reception area.
	Security: Monitor office access and maintain security awareness by following check-in procedures.


What We’re Looking For


	Experience: Previous experience in a reception, administrative, or customer service role is preferred.
	Tech Proficiency: Comfortable using MS Office (Word, Excel, Outlook) and office equipment (printers, VOIP phone systems).
	Communication: Exceptional verbal and written communication skills—you should be as clear in an email as you are in person.
	Professionalism: A polished appearance and the ability to remain calm and resourceful under pressure.
	Multitasking: The ability to juggle several tasks at once without letting the "customer experience" slide.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

HR Officer (Talent Management and Compensation)Job at SIMS Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        SIMS Nigeria Limited - For over three decades, SIMS Nigeria Limited has grown from a single store to a nationwide business in the consumer electronics space with locations across Nigeria. Our journey of consistent growth and dedication has been driven by a commitment to quality in every aspect of our business. From our highly skilled and well-informed staff to the innovations and processes we bring to bear to ensure each customer receives top-tier service and dependable products.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



With pride, we believe we are on a journey to building a legacy rooted in trust, innovation, and exceptional standards riding on our partnership with Samsung, Royal Electronics, Panasonic, Philips, Beko, Kenwood, Powermatic, and many others. Our values continue to guide us, allowing SIMS Nigeria Limited to thrive in a constantly evolving market while delivering lasting value to our customers, partners, and people across Nigeria. With premium products and unmatched service, we are honored to represent these trusted brands in Nigeria, bringing innovation and quality products directly to our customers with the sole aim of enriching their lives. As we continue to expand and adapt to meet the growing needs of our market, SIMS Nigeria Limited remains committed to setting the standard in product quality and service across the nation.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Officer (Talent Management and Compensation)

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	As an HR Officer, you will support the implementation of talent management and compensation & benefits initiatives across the organization.
	You will work closely with business leaders, employees, and the HR team to drive performance management, employee engagement, reward processes, and data-driven HR decisions while ensuring compliance with company policies.


Responsibilities


	Support the execution of performance management processes including goal setting, reviews, and appraisals.
	Assist in talent development initiatives such as succession planning, learning programs, and employee engagement activities.
	Administer compensation and benefits processes including payroll support, benefits coordination, and salary benchmarking.
	Maintain accurate HR data and generate reports to support decision-making.
	Support job evaluation, grading, and compensation structure reviews.
	Assist in developing and implementing HR policies and procedures.


Required Experience / Qualifications


	Candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor’s Degree (minimum of a 2nd Class Degree) in Human Resources, Business Administration, or any related field (CIPM certification will be an added advantage).
	2 – 4 years of experience in HR, with exposure to talent management and/or compensation & benefits.
	Strong analytical, communication, and stakeholder management skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the email.

title: Job Vacancies at Staredge Public Health Concept
content:
Staredge Public Health Concept is a consultancy firm concerned withEnvironmental Sanitation, Pest & Vector Control, System Development & Management, Capacity Building & System, Strengthening for food safety & environmental Health Response, Environmental Hazard Prevention & Control, Environmental impact assessment, environmental auditing, Restoration work, Renovation, Energy, Engineering Installations, Urban structure, Events Management, engineering and architecture, landscape infrastructure, hydraulics & environment, telecoms trading, sales and distribution of general goods & general contractors.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Enforcement Officer
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Abuja 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Join our elite team and play a key role in maintaining law and order! We're looking for energetic and confident individuals to enforce court orders and support our operations.
	Work alongside police, bailiffs, and security experts in a dynamic team environment.


Requirements


	Minimum qualification of HND/BSc Degree
	Physically fit and able to visit at least 10 premises daily.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work in a team and follow instructions.
	Basic reporting skills.
	Relevant experience in enforcement or security a plus.
	Must have a smart phone.


Salary
N120,000 per month. 

Application Closing Date: 26th May, 2026. 

Click here to apply online

 

2.) Field Monitoring Officer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Collect data from business premises across assigned locations
	Serve demand notices and other official documents to establishments
	Retrieve acknowledged copies of served notices and return them to the office
	Record and document evidence where service is refused
	Maintain accurate and up-to-date field records
	File and organize all documentation properly for reporting and compliance purposes


Requirements


	Minimum of First Degree in relevant disciplineor equivalent
	Ability to meet daily targets and work efficiently in the field
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Strong attention to detail and record-keeping ability
	Physically fit and willing to work outdoors
	Prior field experience is an added advantage


Work Structure:


	Target-based role with defined daily deliverables
	Officers will work in teams
	Each team will be assigned a company vehicle and driver for field operations.


Salary
N120,000 monthly.

Application Closing Date: 12th May, 2026.

Click here to apply online

 

3.) Field Officer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 

Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Follow up on all field activitiesacross assigned locations
	Monitor and verify compliance of affected establishments
	Accurately document and report compliance status
	Identify and escalate cases of non-compliance
	Maintain proper records and submit timely field report.


Requirements


	Minimum of HND / BSc or equivalent
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy in reporting
	Ability to work independently and follow instructions strictly
	Good communication and observation skills
	Prior experience in field monitoring or compliance is an added advantage


Salary
N120,000 monthly.

Application Closing Date: 24th May, 2026.

Click here to apply online    

    

        Click here to Apply
